description: BigqueryVectorSearchAssetComponent — k-NN similarity search against a BQ vector column.

base_column.label: Base Column
base_column.description: Column in base_table containing the embedding (ARRAY<FLOAT64>).

select_columns.label: Select Columns
select_columns.description: Columns to return alongside each match (id, text, metadata, etc.).

top_k.label: Top K
top_k.description: Number of neighbors to return per query vector.

query_vectors.label: Query Vectors
query_vectors.description: Static mode: inline list of query vectors. One row of results per vector.

upstream_asset_key.label: Upstream Asset Key
upstream_asset_key.description: From-upstream mode: asset key of an upstream DataFrame holding query vectors.

query_vector_column.label: Query Vector Column
query_vector_column.description: From-upstream mode: column in upstream containing the embedding vector.

query_id_column.label: Query Id Column
query_id_column.description: Optional column in upstream to carry forward as `query_id` in results.

use_brute_force.label: Use Brute Force
use_brute_force.description: If True, force exhaustive scan (no index). Use only for small tables or correctness validation.

fraction_lists_to_search.label: Fraction Lists To Search
fraction_lists_to_search.description: IVF index tuning: 0–1, higher = more accurate / slower. Default uses BQ's choice.

name: Bigquery Vector Search Asset
